title: EME x EBE Compat
description: A resourcepack that gives all EME enchantments textures! Embedded with EBE.
body:
[Even More Enchants](https://modrinth.com/datapack/even-more-enchants) (EME) x [Even Better Enchants](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/even-better-enchants) (EBE) compatibility resourcepack.

**NOTE:** This resourcepack provides textures to all enchanted books added by EME and is embedded with EBE.

This means:
- The enchanted books added by EME will all have their own unique textures.
- The resourcepack contains EBE and its textures, and can be an alternative to EBE.

This resourcepack is compatible with most servers, depending on if the server has a custom resourcepack that might override this pack's textures.

[Even More Enchants](https://modrinth.com/datapack/even-more-enchants) (EME) is required for the main usage of this resourcepack.

---
